title: IMMZD18SHib2DosesWithBoosterDose ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZD18SHib2DosesWithBoosterDose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

First Hib dose from the primary series w.en: First Hib dose from the primary series was administered
First Hib dose from the primary series was administered to the client within 1 year of age. Client's age is less than 5 years

Second Hib dose from the primary series.en: Second Hib dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed
Second Hib dose from the primary series was administered. Client's age is less than 5 years
